name: Lost in Time and Space
intro_text: You have been pulled through the gate — or perhaps you stepped through willingly, knowing there was no other choice. Either way, you are no longer in Dunwich. You are no longer anywhere.
Around you: geometries that hurt to perceive. Colors that have no names. Time moves in directions it was not meant to move. You must find a way back — or make one.
setup_instructions: All other locations begin hidden — they are revealed as investigators explore.
Yog-Sothoth may appear in this scenario — place it as directed by campaign log results.
The goal is to find and use the Dimensional Doorway to escape.

R1.label: Resolution 1 — You find a way home
text: Through the Dimensional Doorway, you glimpse Arkham — battered, cold, real. You step through, and the gate collapses behind you.
The Dunwich Legacy is over. Whatever else may come, you have faced the Lurker at the Threshold and survived.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators escaped from Lost in Time and Space.* Each investigator earns 5 bonus XP. Campaign complete.

R2.label: Resolution 2 — Some are left behind
text: Not everyone makes it through the Doorway before it collapses. Those left behind are... gone. Not dead. Just somewhere else. Forever.
Record in the campaign log: *Some investigators were lost in time and space.* Those investigators are permanently removed from the campaign.

defeat.label: Defeat — Consumed
text: You cannot find the way home. The impossible geometries of this place wear you down until you simply stop. Yog-Sothoth claims what remains.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators were defeated at Lost in Time and Space.* Campaign ends.
